# Sports Platform - Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview
This is a comprehensive sports management platform with Angular frontend and NestJS microservices backend, designed for sports clubs management (initially swimming, scalable to other sports).

## Architecture
- **Frontend**: Angular 18/19 + TypeScript + PrimeNG + NgRx
- **Backend**: NestJS microservices (api-gateway, identity-service, sports-service, club-management, communication)
- **Database**: PostgreSQL + Prisma ORM
- **Authentication**: Google OAuth + JWT hybrid
- **Multi-tenant**: Club-based architecture

## Development Guidelines
- Use TypeScript for all code
- Follow domain-driven design (DDD) patterns
- Implement proper error handling and validation
- Use consistent naming conventions
- Focus on the TrainingCalendarPage as the central component
- Prioritize coach/trainer user experience

## Project Status
- [x] Project structure created
- [ ] Backend microservices setup
- [ ] Frontend Angular application setup  
- [ ] Database schema implementation
- [ ] Authentication system
- [ ] Core features implementation
